title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions · Threat Case: Server Instructions
summary: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext server instructions increment in an MCP primitive and naming contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write concise server-wide constraints, workflows, and rate limits with critical guidance first.
Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
